cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which present. There are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me note down the initial gifts first: - Alice: brown - Bob: orange - Claire: green - Dave: blue - Eve: white Then there are five swaps happening in order. Let me track each swap step by step. First swap: Eve and Bob swap. So Eve gives her white present to
